seo.title: The Area
seo.description: Les Villas Ahlam in Bouskoura — between the Bouskoura forest and Casablanca, 15 minutes from Mohammed V airport. Amenities, schools and golf nearby.

header.title: In Bouskoura,
header.intro: A sought-after address south of Casablanca: the quiet of the forest, the proximity of the golf course and immediate access to major roads.

map.iframeTitle: Access map — Les Villas Ahlam in Bouskoura

paragraphs: Bouskoura embodies a new Casablancan art of living: you breathe the forest air and raise your children in the green, a stone's throw from schools and shops.
The golf course, wooded areas and fast roads to Casablanca and the airport make this southern edge of the metropolis one of the most sought-after residential addresses of the moment.
